design_concept: High-End Tactical Precision. A luxury ballistics data interface leveraging deep navy blue and metallic gold to project authority, precision, and elite tier competition shooting.

rules.h1: text-3xl sm:text-4xl font-black tracking-tighter text-[#D4AF37] uppercase

spacing_and_layout.grid_system: MODE B: THE CONTROL ROOM GRID. Tight gaps (gap-4 or gap-6) for high data density. Every pixel utilized.
spacing_and_layout.border_radius: rounded-sm (2px) to maintain a sharp, tactical instrument feel. No pill-shaped buttons.
spacing_and_layout.alignment: Strict left-alignment for data and forms. Right-alignment for numerical table cells (decimals).

inputs.style: bg-white text-[#0A1526] text-[14px] md:text-[16px] rounded-sm border-2 border-transparent focus:border-[#D4AF37] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#D4AF37] shadow-inner px-3 py-2
inputs.labels: text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.15em] font-semibold text-[#D4AF37] mb-1 block

buttons.primary: bg-[#D4AF37] hover:bg-[#E5C158] text-[#0A1526] font-bold uppercase tracking-wider text-sm px-6 py-3 rounded-sm transition-colors duration-200 shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(212,175,55,0.2)]
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#D4AF37] text-[#D4AF37] hover:bg-[#D4AF37]/10 font-bold uppercase tracking-wider text-sm px-6 py-3 rounded-sm transition-colors duration-200

cards.style: bg-[#112240] border border-[#D4AF37]/20 rounded-sm p-6 shadow-lg

tables.header: bg-[#1A2E50] text-[#D4AF37] text-xs uppercase tracking-wider font-semibold text-left p-3

wizard_navigation.container: flex items-center justify-between w-full mb-8 relative
wizard_navigation.line: absolute top-1/2 left-0 w-full h-[2px] bg-[#1A2E50] -z-10
wizard_navigation.line_active: absolute top-1/2 left-0 h-[2px] bg-[#D4AF37] -z-10 transition-all duration-500
wizard_navigation.step: flex items-center justify-center w-10 h-10 rounded-full border-2 bg-[#0A1526]

ocw_chart.type: Interactive Recharts Scatter Plot or SVG Canvas
ocw_chart.description: Horizontal axis mapping powder charge increments (0.03 grain). Clickable plot area to register vertical/horizontal bullet impact shifts. Background grid should resemble a highly precise MOA/MIL reticle.
ocw_chart.styles: Grid lines in #1A2E50, Impact markers in #D4AF37 with glow effect.

interactions_and_motion.hover_states: Buttons and active rows must have clear, high-contrast hover states. Use slight brightness increases for gold.
interactions_and_motion.transitions: Fast, crisp transitions (150ms-200ms) to emphasize technical responsiveness.
interactions_and_motion.focus_states: All form inputs must highlight with a solid #D4AF37 border on focus.

icons.style: Duotone or sharp Line weights. Icons should be tinted Gold (#D4AF37) or Secondary Slate (#94A3B8).

testing.attributes: All interactive elements (buttons, inputs, wizard steps, chart markers) MUST include a data-testid attribute formatted as kebab-case, role-based. e.g., data-testid='calculate-headspace-button'

images.description: Dark blue metallic texture to be used with a heavy overlay (e.g., bg-[#0A1526]/90) behind the top wizard navigation or hero header to add subtle luxury depth.

implementation_instructions.step_1: Initialize a dark theme layout locking the body background to #0A1526.
implementation_instructions.step_2: Implement the 4-phase wizard component as the primary navigation anchor.
implementation_instructions.step_3: Build the Phase 1 Case Preparation forms with strict white backgrounds and black text for inputs.
implementation_instructions.step_4: Develop the OCW clickable chart in Phase 2 using Recharts (Customized ScatterChart) allowing user click to add data points.
implementation_instructions.step_5: Ensure all calculation outputs (SD, ES, Recommendations) use JetBrains Mono and highlight optimal results in Green (#4ADE80).
